text.title: SEO for SPAs Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: Multi-locale Next.js content site
example.note: routes: / SSG, /blog/[slug] ISR, /docs/* SSG, /app/* CSR (auth dashboard). metadata_strategy=per_route via app router generateMetadata. structured_data Article+BreadcrumbList+Organization. sitemap auto-generated nightly. hreflang en/uk/x-default. cwv_targets LCP 2500ms / INP 200ms / CLS 0.1. Core Update neutral; organic traffic +30% YoY.

example.title: CSR marketing rebuild
example.note: Migration from SSG to CSR for 'simpler architecture'. Organic traffic -60% in 6 weeks. Tree caught: csr-marketing → revert marketing routes to SSG/ISR. Recovery took 3 months.
